metadata.description: Kamal deployment skills for AI agents — deploy, configure, operate, and upgrade apps with Kamal, grounded in the official Kamal documentation

plugins.name: kamal-skills
plugins.description: 22 skills for deploying and operating apps with Kamal: getting started and install, configuration, deploying, building images, rollback, servers and roles, environment variables, secrets, registry, proxy, accessories, SSH, server hardening, cron, booting, logging, app operations, hooks, pruning, aliases, removal, and upgrading 1.x to 2.0 — all grounded in the official Kamal docs
